cslediagnostic.display.name: Chinese Expression Diagnostic
cslediagnostic.checkGlyph.desc: Select the Chinese glyph you want to check
cslediagnostic.convertGlyph.desc: Select the Chinese glyph you want to convert (not the same as check glyphs)
cslediagnostic.checkDocComment.title: Documentation comments
cslediagnostic.excludeNames.desc: Exclude names (keys/fields/tags/function names/method chains) from checking (such as title, div, print, console.log, i18n.t, etc.)
cslediagnostic.excludeMethods.desc: Exclude names (keys/fields/tags/function names/method chains) from checking (such as title, div, print, console.log, i18n.t, etc.)
cslediagnostic.traditional.tw.desc: Check for Chinese (as used in Taiwan)
cslediagnostic.traditional.hk.desc: Check for Chinese (as used in Hong Kong)
